packs.name: engineering
packs.description: Coding standards, security, backend architecture, web app implementation, Firebase services
packs.base: Universal coding standards, security, testing, naming, error handling, architectural principles

subSkills.name: backend-principles

subSkills.name: firebase-firestore
subSkills.description: Firestore provisioning, security rules, queries, indexing

packs.name: design
packs.description: Design system fundamentals, frontend principles, web/mobile design, onboarding UX
packs.base: Universal design system: spacing (4px grid), typography, colors (HSL/OKLCH), visual hierarchy, layout, accessibility, emotional design

subSkills.name: frontend-principles
subSkills.description: Universal frontend rules: zero hardcoded values, token architecture, translations, components, a11y

subSkills.description: Web design: responsive layouts, landing pages, animation, conversion optimization

subSkills.name: design-mobile
subSkills.description: Mobile design: haptics, native transitions, widgets, App Store, gamification

subSkills.name: onboarding-design
subSkills.description: Onboarding flows, paywalls, signup funnels, first-run UX, rating prompts

packs.name: growth
packs.description: Load when working on user acquisition, retention strategy, push notifications, TikTok/social distribution, content farming, paywall optimization, LTV, monetization, or organic viral loops
packs.base: App growth strategy: retention engineering, distribution, content-led growth, VSC framework, monetization, viral loops

subSkills.name: performance-marketing
subSkills.description: Paid ads, Meta/Facebook Ads, ROAS optimization, audience funnels, budget sizing

subSkills.name: lean-analytics-metrics
subSkills.description: Product analytics, KPIs, event schemas, Mixpanel, cohort/funnel analysis

packs.name: brand-voice
packs.description: Load when writing emails, proposals, presentations, LinkedIn posts, sales content, pitch decks, or any brand-aligned content. Also triggers on brand discovery, guideline generation, brand content audits, and voice enforcement.
packs.base: Brand voice enforcement: load guidelines from _dream_context/core/, apply voice constants and tone flexes, validate content, explain brand choices

subSkills.name: discover-brand
subSkills.description: Orchestrate brand material discovery across enterprise platforms (Notion, Confluence, Google Drive, Box, SharePoint, Figma, Gong, Granola, Slack)

subSkills.name: guideline-generation
subSkills.description: Generate brand voice guidelines from documents, transcripts, discovery reports, or direct input. Saves as core file.

standalone.name: system-prompts
standalone.description: Load when writing/reviewing system prompts, configuring AI agents, designing instruction hierarchies, optimizing for Claude/GPT/Gemini/DeepSeek, prompt injection defense, multi-stage agent flows (ReAct, AlphaCodium, LATS), or context engineering

agents.name: reviewer
agents.description: Critical code reviewer and final quality gate. Only flags Critical and Major issues (security, data loss, memory leaks, breaking changes). Returns PASS or FAIL.

agents.name: discover-brand
agents.description: Autonomous 4-phase brand material search across enterprise MCP platforms

agents.name: document-analysis
agents.description: Parse brand documents to extract voice attributes, messaging, terminology

agents.name: conversation-analysis
agents.description: Analyze sales call transcripts for voice patterns and messaging effectiveness

agents.name: content-generation
agents.description: Generate long-form or batch brand-aligned content with validation

agents.name: quality-assurance
agents.description: Validate content and guidelines against brand standards
